component.name: MainScene
component.script:
sub init() m.playlistSelector = m.top.findNode("playlistSelector") m.audioPlayer = m.top.findNode("audioPlayer")
' Listen for playlist selection m.playlistSelector.observeField("playlistSelected", "onPlaylistSelected")
' Listen for back button from player m.audioPlayer.observeField("backPressed", "onBackFromPlayer")
' Pass API config to children when available m.top.observeField("apiBaseUrl", "onApiConfigReady") m.top.observeField("authToken", "onApiConfigReady") end sub
sub onApiConfigReady() ' Pass config to playlist selector if m.top.apiBaseUrl <> "" and m.top.authToken <> "" m.playlistSelector.apiBaseUrl = m.top.apiBaseUrl m.playlistSelector.authToken = m.top.authToken m.playlistSelector.callFunc("loadPlaylists") end if end sub
sub onPlaylistSelected() ' User selected a playlist, switch to player selectedPlaylist = m.playlistSelector.playlistSelected
print ">>> Playlist selected: " + selectedPlaylist.name
' Hide selector, show player m.playlistSelector.visible = false m.audioPlayer.visible = true
' Pass config and playlist to player m.audioPlayer.apiBaseUrl = m.top.apiBaseUrl m.audioPlayer.authToken = m.top.authToken m.audioPlayer.playlistId = selectedPlaylist.id m.audioPlayer.playlistName = selectedPlaylist.name
' SET FOCUS to audio player for key events m.audioPlayer.setFocus(true)
m.audioPlayer.callFunc("loadAndPlay") end sub
sub onBackFromPlayer() ' User pressed back in player, return to playlist selector print ">>> Back from player" m.audioPlayer.callFunc("stopPlayback") m.audioPlayer.visible = false m.playlistSelector.visible = true
' SET FOCUS back to playlist selector m.playlistSelector.setFocus(true) end sub
